vwap.ref: param sweep S-VWAP-SWEEP-DISPATCH (issue #1569) — DRAFT, pending Ben approval
vwap.summary: Proposed SL_STD_MULT_DEFAULT 0.5σ → 0.3σ based on 12-combo ENTRY×SL sweep: 16 windows × 14 days, 365d 5m BTCUSDT, seed=42. ENTRY=1.0/SL=0.3 mean_total_r=+4.88 (rank 1/12); current ENTRY=1.0/SL=0.5 mean_total_r=-0.46 (rank 9/12). SL tier is decisive: all SL=0.3 configs in top-4 regardless of ENTRY. Tight stops cut losing long trades shorter while preserving short-side gains. R:R changes from 2:1 to 3.33:1 at ENTRY=1.0σ. ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD unchanged at 1.0σ. Tier-3 change — requires Ben approval before deploy.

Reverted ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD 1.5σ → 1.0σ (undoing PR #1205) and SL_STD_MULT_DEFAULT 0.75σ → 0.5σ (undoing PR #1183). The 2026-05-17 backtest sweep across 3.16 years of BTCUSDT 5m with the HTF 4h ±2% gate present showed V_1175_htf_only (1.0σ entry, 0.5σ SL) Total R +411.8 vs V_PROD (1.5σ, 0.75σ SL) +133.1 — 3× advantage on the same dataset. The 2026-05-15 #1200 sweep that justified 1.5σ was run without the HTF gate; once the gate is present the optimum shifts. SL widening hurt in both gate regimes.

Wired regime-classifier-baseline-v0 as a shadow predictor on VWAP signals (zero production effect — predictions logged to runtime_logs/shadow_predictions.jsonl only). Promoted to `shadow` stage via trainer-vm-diag #1203. Macro_f1=0.33 on n=4147, f1_range=0.62 — gathering 30 days of data to correlate model-says-range with VWAP winners

Raised ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD 1.0σ → 1.5σ following issue #1200 threshold sweep (8 random 30-day windows, May 2025-April 2026): 1.5σ mean Sharpe 0.015 vs 1.0σ 0.011, mean total R 6.38 vs 6.02, 4/8 positive windows vs 3/8. Cadence drops ~30% (387 → 295 trades/30d). Same ordering as the 38-month V6 experiment, so not regime-overfit

Added min_r_for_vwap_cross (0.25R) + min_hold_minutes_for_vwap_cross (10m) gates on the vwap_cross close path — suppresses micro-R exits from VWAP-drifts-to-price (3/6 closes on 2026-05-14 exited at R-capture 0.009-0.085, net loss after fees)
Raised SL_STD_MULT 0.5→0.75 + added ATR floor on stop distance — reduces premature SL hits on volatile bars
Fixed order_package() SL always falling back to 2% flat stop regardless of signal SL
Added 4h EMA-200 ±2% HTF trend gate — backtest Sharpe -0.39→+2.47, walk-forward OOS +0.22→+1.10
Changed timeframe 15m→5m for faster mean-reversion signal cadence

turtle_soup.summary: Cadence pair: min_sweep_buffer_bps=10, tp1_at_r=1.00, setup_lookback_bars=4 — OOS Sharpe +1.22→+2.48
Tightened atr_stop_mult 0.35→0.30 (+0.53 Sharpe full-sample, +0.97 OOS, no cadence cost)

ict_scalp_5m.summary: Restored enabled=true after PR #1358's unauthorised disable. 90-day re-validation on Dec 2025-Feb 2026 BTCUSDT 5m: 54 trades, 59.3% win rate, +0.382 R expectancy, +20.6 R total, 4.6 R max DD (17 TP / 11 SL / 26 timeout). Clears the PR #1156 pre-live gate decisively — per-trade Sharpe 0.401 just below the 0.5 strict threshold, but annualized Sharpe ~5.94 passes the OR path by 4×. Full incident record: docs/sprint-logs/S-AUDIT-PIPELINE-2026-05-17.md § Addendum

v2 promotion to enabled=true after pre-live gate cleared (issues #1153 + #1154): 59.3% win rate, +0.301 R expectancy, max DD 3.47R on 90 days of fresh BTCUSDT 5m candles. Strategy uses wick rejection + HTF 1h EMA-20 bias + displacement 1.3 × ATR
